title: brasolia altissima
intro: Brasolia altissima, also known as Mountain Brasolia, is a plant species belonging to the Brasolia genus. It is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of Asia, and its leaves, roots, and flowers are used in traditional medicine. Brasolia altissima is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, decoctions, and infusions, as well as being dried and made into capsules or tablets for oral consumption.
